zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Bedingfield於大約1443年出生在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛時，他的父親Thomas Bedingfield16歲，母親Lady Anne de Waldegrave15歲。他於1465年與Alice Shelton在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1496年10月15日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可瓦易藍德享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Bedingfield于大约1443年出生在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Bedingfield16岁，母亲Lady Anne de Waldegrave15岁。他于1465年与Alice Shelton在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1496年10月15日在英国英格兰諾福爾可瓦易藍德享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Bedingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of   Beddingfield  .

variants.name: Beddingfield
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from Bedingfield in Suffolk. The placename is recorded in Domesday Book as Bedingefelda, from the Old English personal name Bēda + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Bedingfield was born about 1443, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas Bedingfield, was 16 and his mother, Lady Anne de Waldegrave, was 15. He married Alice Shelton in 1465, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 15 October 1496, in Wayland, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Oxborough, Norfolk, England.

fr.St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: St Edmund's Church, Kessingland, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Bedingfield est né environ 1443, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bedingfield, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne de Waldegrave, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice Shelton en 1465, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1496, à Wayland, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: St Edmund's Church, Kessingland, Suffolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Bedingfield um 1443 in Oxborough, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bedingfield 16 und seine Mutter Lady Anne de Waldegrave 15. Er hat 1465 in Oxborough, Norfolk, England Alice Shelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1496 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Wayland, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oxborough, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Bedingfield è nato il circa 1443 nel Oxborough, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Bedingfield, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne de Waldegrave, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Alice Shelton nel 1465, nel Oxborough, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 ottobre 1496, nel Wayland, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxborough, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Bedingfieldが約1443年にイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Bedingfieldは16歳，母Lady Anne de Waldegraveは15歳であった。1465年にイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウでAlice Sheltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1496年10月15日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクワイランドで54歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 케징글랜드 스트 에드먼드'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Bedingfield(이)가 대략 1443년 영국 노르폴크 스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bedingfield(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne de Waldegrave(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 노르폴크 스버루에서 Alice Shelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨이랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Bedingfield nasceu aproximadamente 1443, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bedingfield, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne de Waldegrave, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Shelton em 1465, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1496, em Wayland, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: ст эдмунд'с чурч, кессингланд, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Bedingfield родился около 1443 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Bedingfield было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne de Waldegrave, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Shelton в 1465 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 15 октября 1496 г. в местности веиланд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Shelton en 1465, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1496, en Wayland, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
